parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_decisions (
  decision_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  correlation_id TEXT,
  agent_role TEXT NOT NULL,
  decision_type TEXT,
  input_summary TEXT,
  context_used JSONB,
  evidence JSONB,
  decision JSONB NOT NULL,
  recommendation TEXT,
  confidence DOUBLE PRECISION,
  risk_level TEXT,
  requires_human_approval BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  approved_by TEXT,
  action_taken TEXT,
  approved_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  pm_impact TEXT,
  pm_next_action TEXT,
  pm_owner TEXT,
  pm_deadline TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  pm_risk_reason TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_by TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS action_taken TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pm_impact TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pm_next_action TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pm_owner TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pm_deadline TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE;
ALTER TABLE ai_decisions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pm_risk_reason TEXT;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ai_decisions_dedupe_idx ON ai_decisions (correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type) WHERE correlation_id IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO ai_decisions (
  correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type, input_summary,
  context_used, evidence, decision, recommendation, confidence,
  risk_level, requires_human_approval, status,
  pm_impact, pm_next_action, pm_owner, pm_deadline, pm_risk_reason
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12, $13, $14, $15, $16::timestamptz, $17)
ON CONFLICT (correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type) WHERE correlation_id IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  input_summary = EXCLUDED.input_summary,
  context_used = EXCLUDED.context_used,
  evidence = EXCLUDED.evidence,
  decision = EXCLUDED.decision,
  recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  risk_level = EXCLUDED.risk_level,
  requires_human_approval = EXCLUDED.requires_human_approval,
  pm_impact = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.pm_impact, ai_decisions.pm_impact),
  pm_next_action = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.pm_next_action, ai_decisions.pm_next_action),
  pm_owner = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.pm_owner, ai_decisions.pm_owner),
  pm_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.pm_deadline, ai_decisions.pm_deadline),
  pm_risk_reason = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.pm_risk_reason, ai_decisions.pm_risk_reason),
  status = CASE
    WHEN ai_decisions.status IN ('approved', 'rejected', 'externally_approved', 'externally_closed') THEN ai_decisions.status
    ELSE EXCLUDED.status
  END
RETURNING decision_id, correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type, recommendation, risk_level, requires_human_approval, status, pm_impact, pm_next_action, pm_owner, pm_deadline, pm_risk_reason;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.correlation_id, $json.agent_role, $json.decision_type, $json.input_summary || null, JSON.stringify($json.context_used || {}), JSON.stringify($json.evidence || {}), JSON.stringify($json.decision), $json.recommendation || null, $json.confidence, $json.risk_level, $json.requires_human_approval, $json.status, $json.pm_impact || null, $json.pm_next_action || null, $json.pm_owner || null, $json.pm_deadline || null, $json.pm_risk_reason || null ] }}
